name: Chile Con Queso Mini-Bites
recipeIngredient: 1 can Diced Green Chile (4 oz), rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a nonstick skillet with cooking spray. Place over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add chopped tomato, green onions, and minced garlic. Sauté until the onions are tender.
3. Combine the sautéed mixture, beaten eggs, shredded cheddar, Monterey Jack, jalapeno pepper, chili powder, cumin, red pepper flakes, and diced green chiles in a bowl. Stir well to mix thoroughly.
4. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the mixture into miniature muffin pans coated with cooking spray.
5. Bake at 425°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the centers are set. Remove from the oven.
6. Let cool in the pan for 1 minute. Loosen edges with a knife and remove the mini-bites from the pans.
7. Serve warm. Garnish with sliced green chiles if desired.
